tuning: E A D G B E
content:
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
			     Mine - Taylor Swift
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Tabbed by: Krista
Email: leavethepieces@gmail.com

Tuning: Standard

[tab] [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]C5[/ch]  [ch]G5[/ch]  [ch]D5[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G5[/ch]*
e|-3---3---3---3---0---0---2-| |-x---x---x---x---x--|
B|-3---3---3---3---1---0---3-| |-x---x---x---x---x--|
G|-0---0---0---2---0---0---2-| |-5---x---7---x---12-|
D|-2---0---2---0---2---2---0-| |-5---5---7---2---12-|
A|-3---2---2---x---3---2---x-| |-3---5---5---2---10-|
E|-x---3---0---x---x---0---x-| |-x---3---x---0---x--|[/tab]

I'm pretty sure about most of this but some of it is hard to hear because
of the palm muting and I can't tell if it's C or Cadd9, Em or Em7 etc.
It's not really a big difference, personal preference really. I play the
alternate versions to make the palm muting easier. Another way to make it 
easier is to play the power chords I wrote above. Play C5 in place of both
Cadd9 & C, Em in place of Em7 and Em, G5 in place of G during the verses
and chorus, G5* during the pre-chorus, and D5 in place of D and Dsus4. 


[ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] x3 [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]

[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]		     [ch]Dsus4[/ch]     [ch]Em7[/ch]
 You were in college working part time waiting tables[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]	    [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
 Left a small town, never looked back[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Dsus4[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]
 I was a flight risk with a fear of falling[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]	     [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
Wondering why we bother with love if it never lasts[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
  I say can you believe it?[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
 As we're lying on the couch[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
The moment I could see it[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]	 [ch]D[/ch]
Yes, yes, I can see it now[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]	 		 [ch]G[/ch]
 Do you remember we were sitting there by the water[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]	  		  [ch]Em[/ch]	    [ch]D[/ch]
 You put your arm around me for the first time[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]		       [ch]G[/ch]
 You made a rebel of a careless man's careful daughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]		       [ch]Em[/ch]	    [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
 You are the best thing that's ever been mine[/tab]

[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]		 [ch]Dsus4[/ch]         [ch]Em7[/ch]
 Flash forward and we're taking on the world together[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
 And there's a drawer of my things at your place[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]		      [ch]Dsus4[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]
 You learn my secrets and you figure out why I'm guarded[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Yes, yes, this is what I thought about[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
And I remember that fight, two thirty AM[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
You said everything was slipping out of our hands[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
I ran out crying and you followed me out into the street[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]

You said
[tab][ch]C[/ch]	           [ch]G[/ch]
 I remember how we felt sitting by the water[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
 And every time I look at you it's like the first time[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]		       [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
 She is the best thing that’s ever been mine[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]		[ch]G[/ch]
Hold on, we can make it last[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
Hold on, never turn back[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]		       [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]	 [ch]D[/ch]
(Hold on) Do you believe it?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]	 [ch]D[/ch]
(Hold on) We’re gonna make it now[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]	[ch]D[/ch]               
(Hold on) And I can see it[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]	  [ch]D[/ch]
Yeah, yeah (I can see it now, see it now, see it now)[/tab]
